project_name.help: Display name for your Django project.

project_slug.help: Python package name. Press Enter to auto-generate from the project name.

license.help: Choose MIT, BEER, or None (no LICENSE file).

postgres_user.help: Database user for local Docker Compose and .env defaults.

postgres_password.help: Database password for local Docker Compose and .env defaults.

use_jwt.prompt: Use JWT authentication (y/n; n = session auth)
use_jwt.help: y → JWT (simplejwt). n → session-based auth. Users app is always included.

use_sentry.help: Adds sentry-sdk. Only activates when SENTRY_DSN is set in .env.

use_pgadmin.prompt: Include pgAdmin in dev Docker Compose (y/n)

use_redis.help: Adds Redis to Docker Compose and django-redis cache.

use_rabbitmq.help: Message broker. Required when Celery uses the RabbitMQ broker.

use_celery.help: Celery worker + beat. Choose broker with celery_broker.

celery_broker.help: Only used when use_celery=y. redis requires use_redis=y; rabbitmq requires use_rabbitmq=y.

use_asgi.help: y → Uvicorn instead of Gunicorn. Required for WebSockets.

reverse_proxy.prompt: Production reverse proxy (none, nginx, or traefik)
reverse_proxy.help: none → expose app port only. nginx/traefik → TLS-ready proxy; Postgres stays internal.

use_testing.help: pytest, pytest-django, factories, and default API/service tests.

use_ci.help: Adds a CI config file. Choose the provider with ci_provider.

ci_provider.help: Only used when use_ci=y. github → .github/workflows/ci.yml; gitlab → .gitlab-ci.yml.

precommit_base.help: Whitespace, EOF, JSON/YAML/XML, merge conflicts, private keys, etc.

precommit_pyupgrade.help: Modernize Python syntax for the project Python version.

precommit_ruff.help: Lint and format Python with Ruff.

precommit_translation_lint.help: Ensures Django gettext strings use lowercase text.
